examples:
Command Example
#
# Get an alert result
intezer-get-alert-result alert_id=<Alert ID> wait_for_result=true
Context Example
#
{
"Intezer.Analysis": {

outputs.description: The Alert ID Intezer.Alert.Status The Alert status
outputs.name: Intezer.Alert.ID

outputs.description: The full report of the alert Intezer.Alert.Result.intezer_alert_url The url for the alert result on Intezer Analyze
outputs.name: Intezer.Alert.Result

outputs.description: The indicator we tested DBotScore.Type The type of the indicator
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: Hash MD5 URL.Data The tested URL
outputs.name: File.MD5

outputs.description: For malicious URL, the vendor that made the decision URL.Relationships The relationships between two urls
outputs.name: URL.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: The raw alert as submitted to Intezer Intezer.Alert.Result.triage_result.alert_verdict_display The verdict of the alert
outputs.name: Intezer.Alert.Result.raw_alert

outputs.description: The calculated verdict of the Alert Intezer.Alert.Result.triage_result.risk_category_display The risk category of the Alert
outputs.name: Intezer.Alert.Result.source_display

outputs.description: The actions recommended by Intezer to be taken
outputs.name: Intezer.Alert.Result.response.user_recommended_actions_display
